text:
Created attachment 219494
Patch for libbdplus

Update MASTER_SITES, use ports framework instead of trying to work around it and make portlint happy.

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r364979 (amd64) (make + make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
